welcome.name: [Mayor's Name]
message: Welcome to the official website of the Municipality of Calatrava. This portal is part of our commitment to open, accessible, and accountable governance.
Here you can transact with our offices, follow the programs and projects of your local government, and reach us directly. Our doors — and our records — are open to you.

vision: A progressive, resilient, and God-loving municipality with empowered citizens enjoying a sustainable quality of life under transparent and responsive governance.
mission: To deliver efficient public services, promote inclusive economic growth, protect the environment, and uphold the welfare of every Calatravanhon.
history: Calatrava is a municipality on the northern tip of Tablas Island in the Province of Romblon. [Add the founding story, etymology of the name, and key historical milestones here.]
[Describe the town's growth, notable events, and cultural heritage. This placeholder text is rendered from data/officials.json and can be edited freely.]
